description: A photograph of an urban landscape featuring a multi-lane road or highway with multiple vehicles, including cars and trucks, running horizontally across the middle ground. On the right, a large, grey, multi-story building with small rectangular windows occupies the foreground and midground. In the background on the left, a tall, lighter-coloured building, possibly with a glass facade, is visible along with other smaller structures adjacent to the road. A clear blue sky is visible above the buildings and road. A portion of a white vehicle is present in the bottom-left foreground.
